title: SM64C - On Acid and Sugar
description:
Mario took acid and sugar combined and now he's hallucinating and extremely hyper at the same time. The controls were involuntarily slippery and there are invisible walls in some parts of the game that block Mario's way.

I can now record smoother videos now that I have additional RAM memory on my computer. ^^
